workLog.action: Implement bounded GraphQL retry on transient 5xx/429 in gh_graphql (issue #2631)
workLog.evidence: TDD red->green: 6 new retry tests in tests/test_github_core.py::TestGhGraphQL. Command: uv run python -m pytest tests/test_github_core.py tests/test_update_reviewer_signal_stats.py -q result: 220 passed. Mutation test: disabling _is_transient_graphql_error returned False -> 3 retry tests failed (guard bites), restored -> 11 passed. act verification: gh act -W .github/workflows/update-reviewer-stats.yml -j update-stats -n result: DRYRUN Job succeeded (real run needs secrets.BOT_PAT + live GraphQL, so retry contract verified by unit test). Complexity: gh_graphql ~7, helpers <=4, all <=60 lines.
